notes: Converted from the old chapter extraction schema.
Hidden facts, motives, and faction pressures require living-world re-extraction.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed package contains mostly ambiguous/visible battle events and entity descriptions. The only potential hidden fact is that 方源's true body is suspected to be in 龙宫 (paragraph p0005 mentions '本体疑似藏于龙宫'), but this is stated as a description/assertion in the entity list rather than directly sourced from the chapter text as a hidden fact. The source pointers for this are weak - p0005 only has a short quote '方源' with summary '盖世魔头，本体疑似藏于龙宫', but the actual paragraph text is not provided to confirm this is a narrator-level hidden fact vs speculation. Other events (秦鼎菱's motives, 气海老祖 requesting help, battle actions) are either visible events or subjective/ambiguous. No clear hidden/future-known fact with strong source backing can be extracted.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.
气海老祖请求援手被拒，但动机不明——可能是自保需求，也可能是为方源争取时间，也可能是战术需要。仅凭'请求援手'这一行为无法确定其真实动机，不宜做心理跳跃式推断。
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

insufficient source-backed seed: The seed contains mostly individual actors (方源, 气海老祖, 秦鼎菱, 幽魂, 凤金煌, etc.) with individual conflicts and stakes. No named collective faction/group/clan/family has a concrete stake in the seed facts. 黑天寺 is mentioned only as a recipient of a suggestion (气海老祖建议黑天寺派遣仙蛊屋), not as an actor with a stake. 长生天 appears only in a relation describing 秦鼎菱's personal hatred. 天庭 is implied through 秦鼎菱 but not directly acting as a collective. 影宗 is mentioned as 紫薇仙子's faction but no collective stake is shown. 灵缘斋 is mentioned as 凤金煌's affiliation but no collective stake. 龙宫 appears as a location/entity in combat but is not a named faction with members. No collective actor has a concrete stake that can be expressed as faction pressure.
IF export filter quarantined 7 legacy old-schema branches.
